title: Day 22: Day 22 — Virtual Recruiting
content:
# Day 22 — Virtual Recruiting

## Topic
Using remote recruiting to widen your talent pool

## 3–5 Key Points
- **Zoom interviews remove geography as a blocker:** You can meet strong candidates without waiting for in-person logistics.
- **Remote onboarding expands your reach:** A brokerage with solid systems can recruit beyond its immediate local circle.
- **Virtual process needs structure:** Clear scheduling, polished calls, and strong follow-up matter even more online.
- **Digital experience becomes part of the pitch:** If your remote process feels smooth, candidates assume your operations are modern and competent.
- **Wider reach requires tighter qualification:** More access to candidates is only useful if you screen for fit, not just availability.

## Why It Matters
Virtual recruiting lets you reach more agents, faster, and with less friction. Done well, it increases flexibility, speeds up the hiring cycle, and helps your brokerage compete beyond the limits of physical proximity.
